title: Roman Numerals for Enchant Icons
description: Replaces Enchant Icon's numbers with roman numerals.
body:
Changes the Arabic numerals in Enchant icons (1-9) to Roman numerals (I, II, III, etc...) like in vanilla. This should load above Enchant Icons.

**Before**

![A screenshot of what the levels look like without this pack. Each line reads: Sharpness 9, Fire Aspect 3, Knockback 5. Each line has a sword and is colored green, red, and teal in order. The numbers are colored white.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5da58e156924e0798804b4169f693092ffd7d1c.png)

**After**

![A screenshot with this pack. Each line reads: Sharpness IX, Fire Aspect III, Knockback V. Each line has a sword icon before it and is colored green, red, and teal in order. The numbers are colored white.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc99754afe6dd1c013a58e8a746218aaa997466a.png)

_(Note: This pack only changes the numbers. If you want the icons next to enchants and the colored text, check out [Enchant Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchant-icons-countxd))._

## Versions
There is a main version and a gray version. The normal version will have white text to match Enchant Icon's formatting, and the gray version will use the normal vanilla color. 

See the gallery for an example of the gray version.

## Compatability
This pack was made for [Enchant Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchant-icons-countxd), but should be able to overwrite any other pack that changes the numbers.

This pack should also load in any version of Minecraft that supports resource packs, though you may get a warning that is incompatible on some versions. This can be ignored. If any issues occur, please create an issue on the github linked to the side.

This pack should support every language in the game as of 1.21.11.

## How? + Why?
This pack changes the `enchantment.level` and `potion.potency` values in `assets/minecraft/lang` localization files back to the default values, and also adds keys up to level 1000. (With white coloring in the main version of this pack, to match Enchant icon's formatting). 

While this tweak is easy, I made this pack so it can be drop-in simple for anyone and easily be added to modpacks.

## See also
Some related resource packs you may want to check out
1. [Enchant Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchant-display)
1. [Enchant Icons Colorless](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchant-icons-colorless-countxd)
1. [Enchant Icons Reforged](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchant-icons-reforged)
1. [Enchant Display Roman Numerals](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchant-display)
1. [Enchant Display Arabic](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchant-display-arabic)
1. [New level](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-level)
   
Enchant Display and New level can load after Enchant Icons, much like this pack. 

## Modpacks, Modification, Etc...
Do whatever you want with it.
